---
title: Block 6
---
```{r, echo = FALSE, results='asis'}
library(webexercises)
source("include/helper.R")
```

## Exercises

### Übungen 6 – A1

```{r exercise-6a1, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
question_with_single_choice(
	question = "(a) Gegeben seien die beiden Matrizen $A =\\begin{pmatrix} 1 & 2 & -3 \\\\ 0 & 1 & -1 \\\\ 2 & -2 & 0 \\\\ \\end{pmatrix}$ und $B =\\begin{pmatrix} 0 & -1 & 1 \\\\ 1 & 2 & -3 \\\\ 0 & 2 & -2 \\\\ \\end{pmatrix}$. Berechnen Sie $A \\cdot B$, $A^{T}$, $B^{T}$ sowie $B^{T} \\cdot A^{T}$.",
	choices = c(
		"$A \\cdot B = \\begin{pmatrix} 2 & 3 & -1 \\\\ 1 & 0 & -1 \\\\ 2 & -6 & 8 \\end{pmatrix}\\$ $A^{T} = \\begin{pmatrix} 2 & 0 & 1 \\\\ -2 & 1 & 2 \\\\ 0 & -1 & -3 \\end{pmatrix}$ <br><br> $\\ B^{T} = \\begin{pmatrix} 0 & 1 & 0 \\\\ 2 & 2 & -1 \\\\ -2 & -3 & 1 \\end{pmatrix}$ <br><br> $B^{T} \\cdot A^{T} = (AB)^{T} = \\begin{pmatrix} -2 & 1 & 2 \\\\ -6 & 0 & -3 \\\\ 8 & -1 & 1 \\end{pmatrix}$",
		answer = "$A \\cdot B = \\begin{pmatrix} 2 & -3 & 1 \\\\ 1 & 0 & -1 \\\\ -2 & -6 & 8 \\end{pmatrix}\\$ $A^{T} = \\begin{pmatrix} 1 & 0 & 2 \\\\ 2 & 1 & -2 \\\\ -3 & -1 & 0 \\end{pmatrix}$ <br><br> $\\B^{T} = \\begin{pmatrix} 0 & 1 & 0 \\\\ -1 & 2 & 2 \\\\ 1 & -3 & -2 \\end{pmatrix}$ <br><br> $B^{T} \\cdot A^{T} = (AB)^{T} = \\begin{pmatrix} 2 & 1 & -2 \\\\ -3 & 0 & -6 \\\\ 1 & -1 & 8 \\end{pmatrix}$",
		"$A \\cdot B = \\begin{pmatrix} 2 & -3 & -1 \\\\ 1 & 0 & -1 \\\\ 2 & -6 & 8 \\end{pmatrix}\\$ $A^{T} = \\begin{pmatrix} -3 & -1 & 0 \\\\ 2 & 1 & -2 \\\\ 1 & 0 & 2 \\end{pmatrix}$ <br><br> $\\B^{T} = \\begin{pmatrix} 1 & -3 & -2 \\\\ -1 & 2 & 2 \\\\ 0 & 1 & 0 \\end{pmatrix}$ <br><br> $B^{T} \\cdot A^{T} = (AB)^{T} = \\begin{pmatrix} 1 & -1 & 8 \\\\ -3 & 0 & -6 \\\\ 2 & 1 & -2 \\end{pmatrix}$"
	)
)
```

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Lösung"}
$$ AB = \\begin{pmatrix}2 & -3 & 1\\ 1 & 0 & -1\\ -2 & -6 & 8 \\end{pmatrix}$$
$$ A^{T} = \\begin{pmatrix}1 & 0 & 2\\ 2 & 1 & -2\\ -3 & -1 & 0 \\end{pmatrix}$$
$$ B^{T} = \\begin{pmatrix}0 & 1 & 0\\ -1 & 2 & 2\\ 1 & -3 & -2 \\end{pmatrix}$$
$$ B^{T}A^{T} = (AB)^{T} = \\begin{pmatrix}2 & 1 & -2\\ -3 & 0 & -6\\ 1 & -1 & 8 \\end{pmatrix}$$
:::

### Übungen 6 – A2

```{r exercise-6a2, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
question_with_multi_fitb(
	question = "(a) Berechnen Sie $\\begin{pmatrix} -4 & -3 & 2 & 0 \\\\ 1 & 2 & -2 & 2 \\\\ 0 & 3 & 1 & -1 \\\\ 4 & 5 & 0 & 7 \\end{pmatrix} \\begin{pmatrix} 1 \\\\ 1 \\\\ 0 \\\\ 1 \\end{pmatrix}$.",
	fields = list(
		list(prefix = "$x_{1} =$", answer = -7),
		list(prefix = "$x_{2} =$", answer = 5),
		list(prefix = "$x_{3} =$", answer = 2),
		list(prefix = "$x_{4} =$", answer = 16)
	)
)
```

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Lösung"}
(a) $$ \\begin{pmatrix}-4 & -3 & 2 & 0 \\ 1 & 2 & -2 & 2 \\ 0 & 3 & 1 & -1 \\ 4 & 5 & 0 & 7 \\end{pmatrix}\\begin{pmatrix}1 \\ 1 \\ 0 \\ 1\\end{pmatrix} = \\begin{pmatrix}-7 \\ 5 \\ 2 \\ 16 \\end{pmatrix}$$
:::

```{r exercise-6a3, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
question_with_single_choice(
	question = "(b) Berechnen Sie $\\begin{pmatrix} 4 & -3 & 2 \\\\ 0 & 1 & -1 \\\\ -2 & 3 & 0 \\end{pmatrix} \\begin{pmatrix} x \\\\ y \\\\ z \\end{pmatrix}$.",
	choices = c(
		"$\\begin{pmatrix} 4x & + & 3y & + & 2z \\\\ & & y & - & z \\\\ 2x & + & y\\end{pmatrix}$",
		answer = "$\\begin{pmatrix} 4x & - & 3y & + & 2z \\\\ & & y & - & z \\\\ -2x & + & 3y\\end{pmatrix}$",
		"$\\begin{pmatrix} 4x & + & 3y & - & 2z \\\\ x & - & y \\\\ -2x & + & y\\end{pmatrix}$"
	)
)
```

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Lösung"}
(b) $$ \\begin{pmatrix}4 & -3 & 2 \\ 0 & 1 & -1 \\ -2 & 3 & 0 \\end{pmatrix}\\begin{pmatrix}x \\ y \\ z \\end{pmatrix} = \\begin{pmatrix} 4x & - & 3y & + & 2z \\ & & y & - & z \\ -2x & + & 3y\\end{pmatrix}$$
:::

```{r exercise-6a4, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
question_with_multi_fitb(
	question = "(c) Berechnen Sie $\\begin{pmatrix} 3 & -2 & 1 \\\\ 0 & 1 & 1 \\\\ 4 & -1 & 2 \\end{pmatrix} \\begin{pmatrix} 1 \\\\ 2 \\\\ -3 \\end{pmatrix}$.",
	fields = list(
		list(prefix = "$x_{1} =$", answer = -4),
		list(prefix = "$x_{2} =$", answer = -1),
		list(prefix = "$x_{3} =$", answer = -4)
	)
)
```

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Lösung"}
(c) $$ \\begin{pmatrix} 3 & -2 & 1 \\ 0 & 1 & 1 \\ 4 & -1 & 2\\end{pmatrix}\\begin{pmatrix}1 \\ 2 \\ -3 \\end{pmatrix} = \\begin{pmatrix}-4 \\ -1 \\ -4 \\end{pmatrix}$$
:::

### Übungen 6 – A3

```{r exercise-6a5, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
question_with_single_choice(
	question = "(a) Es sei die Matrix $A =\\begin{pmatrix} 0 & 1 & 0 \\ 1 & 0 & 0 \\ 0 & 0 & 1 \\ \\end{pmatrix}$ gegeben. Berechnen Sie $A \\cdot A$. Welche Aussage ist korrekt?",
	choices = c(
		"$A$ ist nicht invertierbar",
		"$A^{2} = A$",
		answer = "$A = A^{-1}$"
	)
)
```

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Lösung"}
(a) $$ AA = \\begin{pmatrix}0 & 1 & 0 \\ 1 & 0 & 0 \\ 0 & 0 & 1\\end{pmatrix} \\begin{pmatrix}0 & 1 & 0 \\ 1 & 0 & 0 \\ 0 & 0 & 1\\end{pmatrix} = \\begin{pmatrix}1 & 0 & 0 \\ 0 & 1 & 0 \\ 0 & 0 & 1\\end{pmatrix} \\Rightarrow A^{-1} = A$$ 
Nach Definition ist $A^{-1}$ die Matrix, für die $A \\cdot A^{-1}= I$ gilt.
Da hier bereits gilt, erfüllt $A \\cdot A= I$  selbst diese Eigenschaft.
Daher ist $A$ seine eigene Inverse.
:::

```{r exercise-6a6, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
question_with_single_choice(
	question = "(b) Es sei $B =\\begin{pmatrix} 1 & 1 & 1 \\ -1 & 1 & 0 \\ 1 & 1 & 0 \\ \\end{pmatrix}$ gegeben. Berechnen Sie $B \\cdot B^{T}$.",
	choices = c(
		"$BB^{T} =\\begin{pmatrix} 2 & 0 & 2 \\\\ 0 & 2 & 0 \\\\ 2 & 1 & 2 \\\\ \\end{pmatrix}$",
		answer = "$BB^{T} =\\begin{pmatrix} 3 & 0 & 2 \\\\ 0 & 2 & 0 \\\\ 2 & 0 & 2 \\\\ \\end{pmatrix}$",
		"$BB^{T} =\\begin{pmatrix} 2 & 0 & 2 \\\\ 1 & 2 & 0 \\\\ 2 & 0 & 2 \\\\ \\end{pmatrix}$"
	)
)
```

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Lösung"}
(b) $$ BB^{T}\\begin{pmatrix}1 & 1 & 1 \\ -1 & 1 & 0 \\ 1 & 1 & 0 \\end{pmatrix} \\begin{pmatrix}1 & -1 & 1 \\ 1 & 1 & 1 \\ 1 & 0 & 0\\end{pmatrix} = \\begin{pmatrix}3 & 0 & 2 \\ 0 & 2 & 0 \\ 2 & 0 & 2\\end{pmatrix}$$
:::
